pattern: Use a running prefix sum against the known total so each candidate index can be checked in constant time for balanced left and right sums.
hints: The right sum at an index equals the total of the whole array minus the left sum minus the element itself.
Sweep once, maintaining the sum of everything before the current index.
Return the first index where the accumulated left sum equals total minus left sum minus the current element.

edge_inputs.description: pivot at the left edge with empty left side
single element has empty sides on both ends
negatives cancel to make an interior pivot
all zeros makes the first index a pivot

stress.description: random arrays sometimes built around a guaranteed pivot
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = rng.randint(1, max(1, size))
    arr = [rng.randint(-1000, 1000) for _ in range(n)]
    if rng.random() < 0.4 and n >= 3:
        i = rng.randint(1, n - 2)
        left = sum(arr[:i])
        right = sum(arr[i + 1:])
        diff = left - right
        arr[-1] = max(-1000, min(1000, arr[-1] - diff))
    return [arr]
stress.note: mixes pure-random arrays with some engineered to have a pivot
